reference: Hello, I appreciate your concern. Musculoskeletal pain is likely and may not be due to any disease, but it may be nonspecific. It can be managed with non-steroidal anti-inflammatory drugs, and sometimes may require tranquillizers as well. I hope this information helps.
text: Hello, I appreciate your concern. Muscle aches and pain is likely and may not be due to any disease, but it may be not specific. It can be managed with nonsteroidal anti-inflammatory drugs, and sometimes may require centralizers as well. With this information, how?
